meta.title: FAQ
meta.description: Answers to questions about delivery, payment and returns at Way Store.

1.title: Can I return or exchange an item?
1.content: Jewellery belongs to the category of goods that cannot be returned under Ukrainian law. The exception is a manufacturing defect confirmed after inspection at the workshop. In that case we will replace or repair the item free of charge.

2.title: What warranty do WAY products carry?
2.content: All WAY products carry a 12-month warranty from the date of purchase. It covers manufacturing defects: metal cracking, coating peeling, clasp failure. Mechanical damage and natural wear are not warranty cases.

3.title: Do you ship abroad?
3.content: Currently delivery is within Ukraine only. International shipping is temporarily suspended. If you are abroad — write to us at hello@way.com.ua and we will find an individual solution.

4.title: Do you have a physical store?
4.content: Yes. The WAY showroom is located in Kyiv — please check the address and opening hours in the Contacts section or call +380 44 000 00 00. Showroom visits are by appointment only.

5.title: How should I care for jewellery?
5.content: Store items separately in soft pouches or a case to avoid scratches. Remove jewellery before contact with water, perfume and household chemicals. Use a soft lint-free cloth for cleaning. We recommend professional cleaning at the workshop once a year.

novaPoshta.title: Nova Poshta
novaPoshta.content: Delivery across Ukraine via Nova Poshta branches and parcel lockers. Delivery time — 1–3 business days. The cost is calculated automatically at checkout depending on weight and location.

courier.title: Courier delivery
courier.content: Courier delivery is available in Kyiv and partner cities. Delivery time — the next business day after order confirmation. Before delivery the courier will call to arrange a convenient time.

card.title: Online card payment
card.content: Secure payment via the WayForPay payment service. VISA and Mastercard are supported. Card data is encrypted and not stored on our servers.

cashOnDelivery.title: Cash on delivery
cashOnDelivery.content: Payment by cash or card upon receipt at a Nova Poshta branch. The cash-on-delivery service is charged according to the carrier's terms.

contacts.heading: CONTACTS
contacts.description: If you have questions about an order, a product or anything else — fill in the form below and we will respond within one business day.
